content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 6, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day's activity focused on expanding the plugin registry with a new submission and an active discussion around a real-world x402 API for agent builders.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
A new pull request, [#335](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/335), was opened to add the `@razzgames/elizaos-plugin` to the registry.

## CLOSED ISSUES

## NEW ISSUES

## ACTIVE ISSUES
### Discussion on Real-world x402 API for Agent Builders
Issue [#6646](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6646) continues to be active, with a new comment from `agent-agora1` highlighting the DeepBlue API's potential for agents making economic decisions, particularly with BTC/ETH momentum signals and Polymarket odds. The comment also introduces Agent Agora, a Schelling focal point game, suggesting that agents using the DeepBlue API's sentiment/signal data could gain a strategic edge. The "wallet IS the credential" philosophy of DeepBlue is noted as aligning with Agent Agora's design. A question was posed regarding the addition of game-theory or coordination-signal endpoints to track trending answers in multi-agent consensus scenarios.
